message:
Rename ksc-agent and kkc-agent to kc-agent (#174)

Sweep all references across the codebase: source code, UI strings,
brew commands, goreleaser config, release workflow, docs, and
rename cmd/ksc-agent directory to cmd/kc-agent.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -56,8 +56,6 @@ vendor/
 # Coordination file (local only)
 .claude-coord.md
 /kc-agent
-/ksc-agent
-/kkc-agent
 
 # Claude Code local files
 .bob/
